title: 11 Herbal Remedies for Runners to Overcome Athlete's Foot
description: Zingiber officinale creams have been used to help alleviate symptoms of athlete's foot, a fungal infection that causes itching, burning, and cracking on the feet. The key to its effectiveness lies in its active compounds, including gingerols and shogaols, which have anti-inflammatory and antifungal properties. These compounds help to reduce inflammation, ease itching, and prevent the growth of fungi that cause athlete's foot.  If you're experiencing athlete's foot, try applying Zingibe...
